case_title: ASPEN SOUTH HILLS APARTMENTS, VS. TAMARA WASHINGTON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASPEN SOUTH HILLS APARTMENTS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASPEN SOUTH HILLS APARTMENTS, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED NOV-04-2003, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT WASHINGTON, TAMARA A.K.A. MS. T. WASHINGTON

MS. T. WASHINGTON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 71 REARDON ROAD, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO ENVELOPE, PLACE IN THE OUT BOX )
